info.title: DotMR - A first-class monorepo management framework for .NET

options.name: --base
options.description: Base git reference to compare against. Default: HEAD

options.name: --compare
options.description: Compare git reference (defaults to working directory)

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format (text or json). Default: text

commands.name: boundary
commands.description: Check dependency boundaries and code ownership

options.name: --affected
options.description: Build only affected projects based on git changes

options.name: --base
options.description: Base git reference for affected detection. Default: HEAD

options.name: --parallel
options.description: Maximum number of parallel build tasks

options.name: --no-restore
options.description: Skip restoring NuGet packages before build

options.name: --platform
options.description: Target platform (github, azure, gitlab). Default: github

options.name: --template-name
options.description:
Template name. Options:
default, full, minimal,
package-publish, container, multi-repo
Default: default

options.name: --tasks
options.description: Comma-separated tasks (build, test, pack). Default: build,test

options.name: --matrix
options.description: Enable matrix builds across OS and .NET versions

options.name: --optimize-for
options.description: Optimize pipeline (speed, cost, balanced). Default: balanced

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Preview generated pipeline without writing to disk

options.name: --diff
options.description: Show changes when regenerating existing pipeline file

options.name: --help
options.description:
Show help information
Template Descriptions:
default/basic       - Standard build and test pipeline
full                - Complete pipeline with all features and multi-platform
minimal             - Bare minimum pipeline for quick builds
package-publish     - Pipeline for building and publishing NuGet packages
container           - Pipeline for building and pushing Docker containers
multi-repo          - Pipeline for repositories with multiple solutions

commands.name: preview
commands.description: Preview pipeline changes and resource estimates

options.name: --platform
options.description: Target platform (github, azure, gitlab). Default: github

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file path to compare against

options.name: --base
options.description: Base branch for comparison. Default: main

options.name: --tasks
options.description: Comma-separated tasks (build, test, pack). Default: build,test

options.name: --matrix
options.description: Enable matrix builds across OS and .NET versions

options.name: --optimize-for
options.description: Optimize pipeline (speed, cost, balanced). Default: balanced

commands.name: clean
commands.description: Clean build artifacts and cache directories

options.name: --affected
options.description: Clean only affected projects based on git changes

options.name: --base
options.description: Base git reference for affected detection. Default: HEAD

options.name: --cache-only
options.description: Clean only .dotmr/cache directory, not build artifacts

options.name: --artifacts-only
options.description: Clean only bin/obj directories, not cache

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Preview what would be deleted without actually deleting

options.name: --parallel
options.description: Maximum number of parallel clean tasks

commands.name: completion
commands.description: Generate and install shell completion scripts

options.name: --lines
options.description: Show last N lines of logs (default: all)

commands.name: start
commands.description: Start the dashboard (and MCP server by default)

options.name: --port
options.description: Dashboard port (default: from config or random)

options.name: --mcp-only
options.description: Start only MCP server, not dashboard

options.name: --dashboard-only
options.description: Start only dashboard, not MCP server

commands.name: stop
commands.description: Stop the running dashboard and MCP server

options.name: --affected
options.description: Format only affected projects based on git changes

options.name: --base
options.description: Base git reference for affected detection. Default: HEAD

options.name: --verify-no-changes
options.description: Verify formatting without applying changes (for CI)

options.name: --parallel
options.description: Maximum number of parallel format tasks

options.name: --project
options.description: Project to query (displays dependencies and dependants)

options.name: --list-all
options.description: List all projects in the graph

options.name: --export-format
options.description: Export format: json, dot, markdown (auto-detected from file extension)

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format (text or json). Default: text

commands.name: migrate
commands.description: Run migration recipes to refactor code

options.name: --continue-on-error
options.description: Continue executing steps even if errors occur

options.name: --list
options.description:
List all available recipes
info <recipe-id>         Show detailed information about a recipe

arguments.name: RECIPE_ID_OR_FILE
arguments.description: Recipe ID or path to recipe file (YAML or JSON)

commands.name: info
commands.description: Show detailed information about a recipe

commands.name: open
commands.description: Open solution or filter file in IDE

options.name: --file
options.description:
Path to solution (.slnx, .sln) or filter (.slnf) file
(defaults to configured solution path)

options.name: --ide
options.description:
IDE to use: VisualStudio, Rider, or VSCode
(defaults to auto-detected default IDE)

options.name: --list-ides
options.description: List all detected IDEs on the system

commands.name: publish
commands.description: Publish NuGet packages in dependency order

options.name: --feed
options.description: Target feed name (uses first enabled feed if not specified)

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Show what would be published without actually publishing

arguments.name: PROJECTS
arguments.description: Paths to specific projects to publish (publishes all if not specified)

options.name: --projects
options.description: Comma-separated project names (all if not specified)

options.name: --strategy
options.description: Version bump strategy: patch, minor, major (default: patch)

options.name: --changelog-only
options.description: Generate changelog only, without version changes

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: json, prometheus, appinsights (default: json)

options.name: --include-cache
options.description: Include cache statistics in the report

options.name: --historical
options.description: Query historical telemetry data (requires persistence enabled)

options.name: --affected
options.description: Restore only affected projects based on git changes

options.name: --base
options.description: Base git reference for affected detection. Default: HEAD

options.name: --parallel
options.description: Maximum number of parallel restore tasks

options.name: --force
options.description: Force restore by clearing NuGet cache and re-downloading packages

commands.name: search
commands.description: Search for projects in the monorepo

options.name: --regex
options.description: Use regex pattern matching instead of glob

options.name: --include-tests
options.description: Include test projects in results (excluded by default)

options.name: --exact
options.description: Require exact name match instead of substring match

options.name: --sort
options.description: Sort results by: name (default), references, or path

options.name: --descending
options.description: Sort in descending order (default is ascending)

arguments.name: QUERY
arguments.description:
Search query to match project names or paths
Supports glob-style wildcards:
* matches any characters
? matches a single character
[abc] matches any character in the set

options.name: --help
options.description:
Show help information
Filter modes:
deps                Include only dependencies (projects the specified project depends on)
dependants/dependents   Include only dependants (projects that depend on the specified project)
both                Include full transitive closure (both dependencies and dependants)

options.name: --affected
options.description: Test only affected projects based on git changes

options.name: --base
options.description: Base git reference for affected detection. Default: HEAD

options.name: --parallel
options.description: Maximum number of parallel test tasks

options.name: --plan
options.description: Show execution plan without running tests

options.name: --retry
options.description: Number of retry attempts for failed tests

options.name: --output-directory
options.description: Export all formats to the specified directory

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: html, dot, markdown, json, mermaid, svg (default: html)

options.name: --full-path
options.description: Show full project paths instead of names

options.name: --projects
options.description: Show only specific projects (comma-separated) and their connections

options.name: --theme
options.description: Theme for HTML: light, dark, high-contrast (default: light)
